reviews.comment:
Como siempre el ACA con buenos servicios, personal de playa muy atentos y serviciales, combustibles YPF de buen rendimiento. Parada obligada en V.C.Paz tanto a su llegada como a su salida.

(Translated by Google)
As always, ACA offers excellent service, attentive and helpful beach staff, and efficient YPF fuel. A must-stop in V.C. Paz, both on arrival and departure.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSbU9fckFnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Nos atendieron unas chicas con una excelente predisposición, unas genias y toda la paciencia. Los mejores batidos los romanos aca!

(Translated by Google)
We were served by some wonderful, friendly, and incredibly patient girls. The best Roman-style milkshakes are here!
